name: Creamy Vanilla Pudding (M-a-m)
recipeIngredient: 2/3 cup VANILLA PUDDING AND PIE MIX
recipeInstructions:
1. In a medium bowl, beat the egg yolks; set aside.
2. In a medium saucepan, combine the VANILLA PUDDING AND PIE MIX and milk. Cook and stir over medium heat until the mixture thickens and begins to bubble.
3. Stirring vigorously, pour about half of the hot mixture into the beaten egg yolks.
4. Stir the egg yolk mixture into the remaining hot mixture. Cook and stir for 1 minute longer.
5. Remove from heat. Stir in the butter or margarine and vanilla until blended.
6. Pour the cooked pudding into 6 dessert or custard cups. Cover each with plastic wrap.
7. Refrigerate for 1 hour.
